parameters.jsCode:
// Build HTML Email — takes LLM summary + raw alert data and produces a styled email const llmText = $('AI Summary Generator').first().json.text || 'AI summary unavailable.'; const alertData = $('Calculate Stock Signals').first().json; const { report_date, total_parts_monitored, alerts_count, healthy_count, critical_count, total_estimated_reorder_cost, alerts, depots_affected } = alertData; // Severity badge colors const severityColors = { STOCKOUT: { bg: '#DC2626', text: '#FFFFFF' }, CRITICAL: { bg: '#EA580C', text: '#FFFFFF' }, WARNING: { bg: '#D97706', text: '#FFFFFF' }, WATCH: { bg: '#2563EB', text: '#FFFFFF' }, }; // Build the alert table rows const stockoutAndCritical = alerts.filter(a => a.severity === 'STOCKOUT' || a.severity === 'CRITICAL'); const warningAndWatch = alerts.filter(a => a.severity === 'WARNING' || a.severity === 'WATCH'); function severityBadge(sev) { const c = severityColors[sev] || { bg: '#6B7280', text: '#FFFFFF' }; return `${sev}`; } function buildTableRows(items) { return items.map(a => ` ${severityBadge(a.severity)} ${a.part_id} ${a.part_name} ${a.depot} ${a.current_stock} ${a.reorder_threshold} ${a.days_of_stock_left === 999 ? '∞' : a.days_of_stock_left + 'd'} ${a.supplier_lead_time_days}d ${a.suggested_order_qty} €${a.estimated_order_cost_eur.toLocaleString()} `).join(''); } // Convert LLM text (may have markdown-style formatting) to basic HTML const llmHtml = llmText .replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/g, '$1') .replace(/^### (.*$)/gm, '

$1

') .replace(/^## (.*$)/gm, '

$1

') .replace(/^- (.*$)/gm, '
• $1
') .replace(/^\* (.*$)/gm, '
• $1
') .replace(/\n\n/g, '

') .replace(/\n/g, '
'); const html = `
${stockoutAndCritical.length > 0 ? ` ` : ''} ${warningAndWatch.length > 0 ? ` ` : ''}
📦 Stock Signal Monitor
EMEA Equipment Maintenance • Zebra Technologies
${report_date}
${critical_count}
Critical / Stockout
${alerts_count - critical_count}
Warning / Watch
${healthy_count}
Healthy
€${total_estimated_reorder_cost.toLocaleString()}
Est. Reorder Cost
Depots affected: ${depots_affected.map(d => `${d}` ).join(' ')}
🤖 AI Analysis
${llmHtml}
🚨 Critical Actions Required (${stockoutAndCritical.length})
${buildTableRows(stockoutAndCritical)}
STATUS PART ID PART NAME DEPOT STOCK MIN DAYS LEFT LEAD TIME ORDER QTY EST. COST
⚠️ Watch List (${warningAndWatch.length})
${buildTableRows(warningAndWatch)}
STATUS PART ID PART NAME DEPOT STOCK MIN DAYS LEFT LEAD TIME ORDER QTY EST. COST
Monitoring ${total_parts_monitored} parts across ${depots_affected.length} depot(s) • ${healthy_count} parts within normal levels • Generated by n8n AI Workflow • Unsubscribe
`; return [{ json: { emailHtml: html, subject: `Stock Signal Alert — ${report_date} — ${alerts_count} items flagged (${critical_count} critical)` } }];

parameters.formTitle: Stock Signal Monitor for Zebra — Live Demo
parameters.formDescription: Enter your email to receive a sample AI-powered stock signal report. Built by Omar-B with n8n.

parameters.subject: ⚠️ Stock Monitor Failed — Google Sheets read error
parameters.message:
==
⚠️ Workflow Error
Stock Signal Monitor • EMEA Depot Planning
Google Sheets Read Failed
The daily stock signal workflow could not read inventory data from the spreadsheet. The scheduled alert digest was not generated.
Error details:
{{ $json.error?.message || 'Unknown error — check n8n execution log' }}
Recommended actions:
• Check that the Google Sheets credential is still authorized
• Verify the spreadsheet has not been deleted or moved
• Check the n8n execution log for full error details
Automated alert from n8n Stock Signal Monitor

parameters.subject: ⚠️ Stock Monitor — AI Analysis Failed — {{ $('Calculate Stock Signals').item.json.report_date }}
parameters.message:
==
⚠️ AI Summary Unavailable
Stock Signal Monitor • {{ $('Calculate Stock Signals').item.json.report_date }}
AI analysis could not be generated
The Anthropic API call failed. The raw alert data is included below so the planning team can still act on today's signals.
{{ $('Calculate Stock Signals').item.json.critical_count }} Critical/Stockout • {{ $('Calculate Stock Signals').item.json.alerts_count }} Total Alerts • {{ $('Calculate Stock Signals').item.json.depots_affected.join(', ') }}
Raw alert data:
{{ JSON.stringify($('Calculate Stock Signals').item.json.alerts, null, 2) }}
Automated fallback alert from n8n Stock Signal Monitor
